headlines.title: Gedatolisib + Fulvestrant
headlines.summary: FDA approved gedatolisib with fulvestrant, with or without palbociclib, for PIK3CA-wild-type HR-positive/HER2-negative metastatic breast cancer after endocrine progression, adding a large progression-free-survival gain in a setting where many patients have already exhausted first-line endocrine options.
